title: Fence stale lease owners after worker takeover
prompt: Repair the lease-based worker's fencing so a paused old owner cannot commit after another worker takes over. Every successful acquisition of an absent or expired lease must receive a positive fencing token that is strictly greater than every token previously issued by that coordinator. A renewal is allowed only for the current ownership epoch strictly before its expiry; it extends the lease without changing its token. A lease is expired at its exact deadline, unsuccessful acquisitions must not consume tokens, current owners may commit repeatedly, and the fenced result store must reject writes carrying a token older than one it has already accepted. Preserve the existing public API and error behavior. Do not modify the protected tests. Run `bash test.sh`; verification must remain offline and deterministic.
